context: pleural effusion in 2-3%; ascites + hydrothorax resolve with tumor removal unilateral; R > L (in 75%), recurrent alternating sides; pleural effusion relatively unchanged in size for months; predominantly in men; LOW GLUCOSE content of 20-50 mg/dL (in 70-80%) without increase following IV infusion of glucose (DDx: TB, metastatic disease, parapneumonic effusion) √  ⇑ size of cardiovascular silhouette (in 35-50%) CXR: √  first 300 mL not visualized on PA view (collect in subpulmonic region first, then spill into posterior costophrenic sinus) √  lateral decubitus views may detect as little as 25 m
